overview: Chosen One Distribution is a production-grade global music distribution platform where artists upload and sell music directly to customers. Artists sign in with a name and PIN, upload singles or albums, set their own prices, and earn 85% of every sale via live Stripe payments. Customers can browse the store, preview songs with a waveform player, purchase tracks with Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, CashApp, Zelle, or card, and immediately download their purchases.
features: Artist sign-up and login with name + PIN
Single and batch album upload (up to 10 songs)
Music store with search, genre filters, and waveform preview player
Live Stripe checkout with Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, CashApp, Zelle, and card
Immediate post-purchase download in original MP3 or WAV format
30-day re-download window via My Purchases panel
Artist dashboard with real-time analytics (previews, sales, revenue, payouts)
Royalty dashboard with 85% payout, banking info, and payout requests
Artist profile pages with social media links (Instagram, Twitter/X, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)
Push notifications when a liked artist releases new music
Admin panel with real-time traffic analytics and artist management
On-site customer support chat assistant with escalation to complaints
Top-selling and most-viewed song highlights with gold badges
11 legal and support pages with real professional content
Gold-on-black premium branding with crown motifs and rolling crown animations
Multilingual support in 8 languages with dark mode toggle
